description: Production stability testing for anchor context compression skill. 200+ tests covering verbs, extraction, graph, LLM judge, benchmarks, hooks. 5 Ralph iterations to verify zero flaky tests.

userStories.title: Expand verb lexicon tests (verbs.py)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need 55+ verb tests covering all types across English/Chinese with past tense and edge cases.
acceptanceCriteria: 30 English verb tests: DECISION/DISCOVERY/ANOMALY/CONSTRAINT with past tense (decided, found, crashed)
10 Chinese verb tests: 决定/发现/报错/必须 with synonym variants
5 compound verb tests: 'tracked down', 'opted for', 'narrowed down'
5 case-insensitive tests: 'Decided', 'FOUND', 'Crashed'
5 unknown verb tests: return FACT for unlisted verbs
segment_text() performance: 1000 char text < 0.01s
Tests pass

userStories.title: Expand entity extraction tests (extractor.py)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need 50+ entity tests verifying DATA/TECH/TERM classification, garbage filtering, and edge cases.
acceptanceCriteria: 15 DATA entity tests: versions(14.2), error codes(ERR_005), numbers+units(200ms, 2.1GB), line numbers(:42)
15 TECH entity tests: filenames(auth.ts), PascalCase(PostgreSQL, OAuth2), camelCase, UPPER_CASE, domains
10 garbage filter tests: sentence-initial caps(Decided), bare numbers(<10), fragments
5 Chinese entity tests: 分布式锁, 跨Pod同步
5 mixed entity tests: Chinese+English combined text
_is_proper_entity() edge cases: Redis(5chars), Decided(7chars), Cannot(6chars)
Tests pass

userStories.title: Expand bidirectional graph tests (extract_graph)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need 43+ graph tests verifying VerbAnchor+NounAnchor creation, links, dedup, and Top-N.
acceptanceCriteria: 10 verb anchor tests: each verb correctly links to nearest noun
10 noun anchor tests: each noun correctly links to nearest verb, tags populated
8 link integrity tests: no dangling references, bidirectional consistency
5 dedup tests: duplicate entities/verbs filtered out
5 Top-N tests: 30 messages produces 12-20 anchors (<= max(8,30//2))
5 empty/tiny input tests: 0 messages, 1 message, blank content
Tests pass

userStories.title: LLM judge dual-mode tests (judge.py)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need 29+ judge tests covering LLM mode (tag generation), fallback mode (no API key), and error handling.
acceptanceCriteria: 8 LLM mode tests: 10 candidates -> select 6 most significant, tags non-empty
8 Fallback mode tests: no API key -> balanced verb+noun selection with quota
5 tag quality tests: LLM tags cover database/cache/auth/performance/monitoring domains
5 edge case tests: empty candidates, all-noise, verbs-only, nouns-only
3 API error tests: network timeout, empty JSON response, malformed JSON
Tests pass

userStories.title: Compression ratio benchmarks
userStories.description: As a developer, I need 23+ benchmark tests verifying compression stays above 85% across domains and lengths.
acceptanceCriteria: 5 backend domain tests: 30 backend messages -> >= 85% compression
5 frontend domain tests: 40 frontend messages -> >= 85% compression
5 mixed domain tests: 50 mixed messages -> >= 80% compression
5 short conversation tests: 5-10 messages -> reasonable anchor count
3 extreme tests: 100 messages -> >= 90% compression
Tests pass

userStories.title: Reconstruction quality tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need 25+ reconstruction tests verifying anchor windows contain ground-truth information.
acceptanceCriteria: 10 query match tests: known queries hit correct anchors, windows contain expected keywords
5 tag-driven match tests: semantic tags enable 'database'->'PostgreSQL' matching
5 link traversal tests: follow verb->noun or noun->verb links, window covers both positions
5 negative tests: irrelevant queries should not match with high confidence
Tests pass

userStories.title: Auto-generate test conversation data
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a script that generates random conversations across 6 domains x 3 lengths x 2 languages = 36 files.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/generate_test_data.py script
6 domains: backend, frontend, devops, data-science, mobile, game-dev
3 lengths: short(10msgs), medium(30msgs), long(60msgs)
2 languages: English, Chinese
Each conversation contains: decision verbs, anomalies, data values(versions/line-numbers/error-codes)
Generate 36 conversation files saved to tests/data/
Tests pass

userStories.title: Performance benchmark tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need 8+ performance tests verifying extraction speed < 0.1s for 50 messages and bounded memory.
acceptanceCriteria: 3 extraction speed tests: 10/50/100 messages, record timing
2 memory tests: 100 messages uses < 50MB
2 SQLite perf tests: FTS5 search < 0.05s
1 cold start test: first extraction (cold) vs second (warm)
Tests pass

userStories.title: Hook script integration tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need 16+ hook tests verifying pre_compact, inject, stop_backup scripts work with stdin/stdout.
acceptanceCriteria: 5 pre_compact tests: different stdin JSON formats -> anchors saved to disk
5 inject tests: saved anchors -> valid hookSpecificOutput JSON with additionalContext
3 stop_backup tests: session exit saves anchors, including edge cases
3 error handling tests: corrupted JSON, empty input, oversized input
Tests pass

userStories.title: Ralph autonomous loop — 5 iterations
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Ralph to run the full test suite 5 times autonomously, catching flaky tests and regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: prd.json contains all 10 user stories with correct priorities
Ralph runs 5 iterations: each spawns fresh Claude Code instance
Each iteration: run all 200+ tests -> record pass/fail -> fix failures -> commit
After 5 iterations: all tests pass stably, zero flaky
progress.txt records per-round pass rate and learnings
Tests pass
